overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a medieval village on a sunny day. The character travels along cobblestone paths, crosses a wooden bridge over water, passes soldiers in red uniforms, and approaches a large stone castle with red-tiled towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural cobblestone path approaching river crossing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a cobblestone path toward a wooden bridge, with two swords visible on his back

entered.detail: irregular stone paving forming the main walking surface
tall green trees lining the path edges
calm water visible to the left of the path
wooden footbridge with railings crossing the river ahead
medieval-style sailing vessel with tan sails docked on the river

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny rural path made of uneven cobblestones. Geralt walks toward a wooden bridge crossing a calm river, with a sailing ship visible in the distance. Trees and grass line the path, and wooden village structures appear on the right horizon.

events.description: steps from cobblestone path onto wooden bridge structure

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden bridge while approaching three guards in red uniforms walking ahead

notable_agents.action: three guards in red Nilfgaardian uniforms walking across the bridge in the same direction

entered.detail: rough wooden fence railings lining both sides of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wooden bridge crossing the river, with water now visible on both sides below. The camera follows Geralt as he approaches three guards in distinctive red uniforms walking ahead. The stone castle becomes more prominent in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village street with wooden houses

events.description: passes by the group of three guards who move to the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking through the village outskirts, passing wooden houses and villagers sitting near the roadside

notable_agents.action: two villagers sitting on a bench outside a wooden hut, watching the road

entered.detail: rustic wooden structures with thatched and shingled roofs lining the path
small hut with straw-thatched roof where villagers are seated
low stone retaining wall running alongside the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: Exiting the bridge, the path continues through a village with wooden houses and thatched cottages on the right. Geralt passes the guards and villagers sitting by the roadside. The stone castle with its red-tiled towers grows larger ahead, dominating the skyline.

events.description: path narrows between stone walls as the castle gate comes into direct view

agents.ego_description: approaching the main castle gate, walking along the final stretch of cobblestone path flanked by stone walls

notable_agents.action: single guard in red uniform standing near the castle entrance

entered.detail: large arched stone entrance with metal portcullis and red banners
tall fortified stone walls with crenellations lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to the castle proper, with high stone walls flanking the cobblestone path. The castle gate with its arched entrance and defensive towers dominates the view ahead. A lone guard stands near the entrance as Geralt continues his approach along the curving walled path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunny rural path that gradually leads into the fortified entrance of a massive stone castle. It begins on an uneven cobblestone road lined with grass and trees, moving toward a wooden bridge that spans a calm river with a distant sailing ship. As the camera crosses the bridge, the view opens up to reveal guards in red uniforms walking ahead while the castle's silhouette becomes more prominent on the horizon. The scene then shifts into a village setting, passing thatched cottages and roadside villagers before the red-tiled towers of the fortress begin to dominate the skyline. Finally, the path curves between high stone walls, leading directly toward a guarded arched gateway and the imposing defensive towers of the castle.
